{{Item
| image = Head_band_blank.png
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Non-dyeable
| stackable = 64
}}

'''Head Band''' is a non-dyeable equipable item that makes your dog look mysterious.
{| class="wikitable"
|+
!No.
!Sprite
!Pattern
!ID
!Description
!Craftable?
|-

|1
|[[File:head_band_blank.png]]
|Blank
|doggytalents:head_band_blank
|
|Yes
|-
|2
|[[File:head_band_mystery.png]]
|Mysterious
|doggytalents:head_band_mystery
|Who's that wolfy boi?
|No
|-
|3
|[[File:head_band_highhh.png]]
|Highhh
|doggytalents:head_band_highhh
|The Dev's favorite emoji.
|No
|-
|}
[[File:Head_band_display.png|none|thumb|600x600px]]

== Obtaining ==
* Currently you can only craft the Head Band Blank, the others can be obtained via the Creative menu.
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| Lead <br>+ Paper<br> + [[Training Treat]]
| [[File:Head band crafting.png]]
|}
== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}
== Trivia ==
* It was introduced in DTN 1.17.2.
